scripts.bench:payload-frame: npm run sync-shared && npm run build --workspace n8n-nodes-plug-database && node ./scripts/benchmark-payload-frame.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:root && npm run test:packages
scripts.test:root: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config vitest.config.mts
scripts.test:coverage: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config vitest.config.mts --coverage
scripts.test:e2e: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config tests/e2e/vitest.config.mts
scripts.test:e2e:rest: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config tests/e2e/vitest.config.mts tests/e2e/rest.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:socket: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config tests/e2e/vitest.config.mts tests/e2e/socket.e2e.test.ts
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run verify:surface && npm run verify:doc-links && npm run migrate:workflows:check-examples && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
